untranslatable_reason: This signal requires tracking a ratio between two separate instruments (crude oil price / gold price). The backtesting engine only supports single-instrument indicators. To implement this signal, the engine would need: (1) dual-instrument ratio calculation capability, (2) cross-asset price feeds, or (3) a pre-computed ratio indicator. The allowed indicator set contains no ratio or spread-based metrics that can compare crude and gold prices.
translation_notes: Signal involves a spread/arbitrage trade across two commodities (crude oil long, gold short) based on their price ratio trend. This is fundamentally a multi-instrument strategy that cannot be expressed using single-instrument indicators from the allowed list. Recommend creating a custom dual-asset ratio indicator or pre-calculating the crude/gold ratio as a separate data feed.
